projects.title: frankstonnetball
projects.description: Worked as a Frontend Developer, developing key interface sections including the header navigation and multiple page components. Helped establish consistent structure and layout across the application while ensuring clean, maintainable, and scalable implementation.

projects.title: republik
projects.description: Contributed as a Frontend Developer in building a single-page WordPress (Gutenberg) implementation, focusing on structuring content blocks and integrating GSAP animations to enhance interactivity and user engagement.
